ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN number for each publication */,
  "code" TEXT /* Unique code for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the publication */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the publication belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the publication */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the publication */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the publication */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the publication */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was published */,
  "cover_image" TEXT /* Cover image of the publication */,
  "file" TEXT /* Digital file of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords related to the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "image" TEXT /* Author's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the review was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_workflow" (
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workflow entry */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being tracked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the publication (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the publication */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the publication */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_workflow_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_workflow_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being tracked */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., views, downloads, ratings) */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_metrics_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
column_names: ID of the author of the publication
ID of the category the publication belongs to
Number of pages in the publication

ID of the publication being reviewed
ID of the user who wrote the review
Date the review was last updated
